name: Create Circuit Diagram Lesson
description: Create a 3-page interactive science lesson on electrical circuits in ActivInspire. Page 1 must include the title 'Electrical Circuits', the terms 'series' and 'parallel', and an 'Essential Question'. Page 2 should be titled 'Series Circuit' and contain a labeled diagram of a series circuit with a battery, bulb (or resistor), and switch. Page 3 should be titled 'Parallel Circuit' and contain a labeled diagram with at least two branches including a battery, bulb/resistor, and switch, along with a note about 'branches' or 'paths'. Save the final flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/circuit_diagram_lesson.flipchart.
